character_buff.name: Resuscitation
character_buff.description: Heals a character who is incapable of combat.

skills.name: Recover
skills.description: Cure various abnormal disease that might afflict team members.

skills.name: Resuscitation
skills.description: Heals a character who is incapable of combat.

skills.name: Cure All
skills.description: Restores HP of an ally by large amount.

skills.name: Mass Cure
skills.description: Fully recover HP of all team members.

skills.name: Intensify
skills.description: Increases ATK of all team members.

skills.name: Fortify
skills.description: Increases Max HP of all team members. Not applied with [Acceleration] simultaneously.

skills.name: Acceleration
skills.description: Increases Attack/Move SPD of all team members. Not applied with [Fortify] simultaneously.

skills.name: Meditation
skills.description: Increases HP/SP Regen. of all team members.

skills.name: Detection
skills.description: Reveals invisible characters and locates hidden objects.

skills.name: Critical Disease
skills.description: Builds a trap that releases a poisonous cloud of smoke when triggered.

skills.name: Invisible String
skills.description: Set a booby trap that deals Physical Damage to enemies. (Also applicable to flying monsters.)

skills.name: Explosion
skills.description: Sets an explosive trap that blocks attacks from several enemies at the same time.

skills.name: Consolidation
skills.description: Increases penetration rate.

skills.name: Prompt Action
skills.description: Skill casting time of your family decreases.

skills.name: Divine Bless
skills.description: Increases HP and SP regeneration of your family. Regeneration increases with level.

skills.name: Refresh Mind
skills.description: Clear mind of target to remove abnormal status, and reset all cooldowns for current stance.

skills.name: Cortar en Recta
skills.description: Impale enemies on your blade and rend him apart. Reduces defence of enemies.

skills.name: Baile Soleares
skills.description: A series of powerful slashes.

skills.name: Ventaja Ligera
skills.description: Allows you to break through enemy lines with powerful slashes.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 8m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Sierra Ilimitada
skills.description: Strikes suddenly to catch enemies unawares.

stances.name: Arnis

skills.name: Lado Patada
skills.description: Stabs the enemy lethally and kicks it into the air.

skills.name: Asesinato
skills.description: Throw a dagger at a fallen enemy.

skills.name: Intoxicacion
skills.description: Applies venom on a dagger. Each subsequent attack can inflict Paralysis on enemy.

skills.name: Asalto
skills.description: Attacks and paralyzes enemies.
skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 5m away and within a 1m radius

skills.name: Rapida Ataque
skills.description: Attacks the weak point of enemy.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 11% of extra [STR]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 4% DMG according to extra [STR]
Ignore additional DEF according to extra [STR] * 4
Additional DMG against Monster according to 4 * 50

skills.name: Principal
skills.description: Provide basic buffs to team. The power can be doubled according to the circumstances.

skills.name: Melee Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Melee Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Magic Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Magic Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Shooting Enhance
skills.description: Gives the buff that makes Shoot Stance attack much stronger.

skills.name: Escape Artist
skills.description: Cancel darkness type curse on squad members as well as detect invisibility. Increase resistance of darkness type curse for a given time.

skills.name: Devolver Ataque
skills.description: Attacks enemies with a series of lightning quick slashes.

skills.name: Viento Fantasma
skills.description: Hurls two daggers at enemies.

skills.name: Baile de Guerra
skills.description: Drives enemies back by whirling through the air with a set of double daggers.
skills.target: Up to 9 enemies 7.2m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Miembro Invisible
skills.description: Hurls daggers at surrounding enemies.

skills.name: Acid Stalker
skills.description: It is activated once an enemy comes into view. Rushes toward enemy and installs a trap that detonates with acid gas.

levels.value: Available to install up to 3 at the same time
Available to install up to 3 at the same time

skills.name: Pain Killer
skills.description: Reduces the damage from magic skill attack by blunting the feelings of nearby allies.

skills.name: Impact Spike
skills.description: It is activated once an enemy comes into view. Rushes toward enemy and installs a trap that detonates lots of spines every which way.

levels.value: Available to install up to 3 at the same time
Available to install up to 3 at the same time

skills.name: Mass Evasion
skills.description: Reduces the damage from physical wide skill attack by blunting the feelings of nearby allies.

skills.name: Adrenaline Fever
skills.description: Improves physical conditions of all team members and helps to heal fast.

skills.name: Miracle
skills.description: Execute a tactic that increases the offensive and defensive capacity of the ally.

skills.name: Protecting Booster
skills.description: Increase the defensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Shearing Booster
skills.description: Increase the offensive capacity of target ally.

skills.name: Bartor
skills.description: Remove all harmful effects and restore HP of all team members.

skills.name: Additional Training
skills.description: Increase skill level by enhancing own tactical capacity.

levels.value: Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.
Increase all skills level by enhancing your own tactical capacity.

stances.name: Stalker

skills.name: Counterforce
skills.description: Rush towards an enemy to neutralize.

skills.name: Intrusive
skills.description: Generate shards of winds from tonfa and throw all around.
skills.target: Up to 8 targets within a 10m surrounding radius

skills.name: Intimidate
skills.description: Intimidate an enemy using rough attacks.

skills.name: Shadow Formation
skills.description: Melt into the shadows and increase capabilities.

skills.name: Bloody Lust
skills.description: Rapidly cut the enemy to give strong damage.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 10% of extra [AGI]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 3% DMG according to extra [AGI]
Ignore additional DEF according to extra [AGI] * 4
Additional DMG against Monster according to 3 * 50

stances.name: Time Manipulation

skills.name: Shared Timeline
skills.description: Increase the power of allies by giving visions of a different timeline. Cannot stack with [Miracle] buff.

skills.name: Anachronistic Shelter
skills.description: Provide a defensive buff to allies

skills.name: Veil of Dischord
skills.description: Mitigate Harmful Debuffs done to allies by creating a magical barrier.

skills.name: Continuum
skills.description: Quickly fatigue enemies within an area.

skills.name: Distortion
skills.description: Distort the area around the enemy.

lv25_bonus_extra: [RE: PvE] Skill DMG increases equal to 5% of extra [INT]
[PVP/PVE Maps] Additional 1% DMG according to extra [INT]
